name: Charoen Pokphand Enterprise(Taiwan) Co., Ltd.
summary: Charoen Pokphand Enterprise(Taiwan) Co., Ltd. engages in the agriculture, animal husbandry, and food businesses in Taiwan and internationally. It produces and sells feed for chicken, pigs, and ducks, as well as fresh and frozen chicken, pork, and meat products; and cooked and other related consumable food products. The company also imports and sells animal medicine; and provides husbandry management services for chickens to produce eggs and meat. In addition, it offers agricultural livestock products. The company was formerly known as Taiwan Pokphand Feed Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Charoen Pokphand Enterprise(Taiwan) Co., Ltd. in 1988. The company was founded in 1921 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
